articles.title: 'The Odyssey' Trailer: Cyclops and Evil Robert Pattinson - Variety
articles.description: Watch the new trailer for Christopher Nolan's 'The Odyssey'

articles.title: See the Met Gala 2026 best looks and moments of Beyoncé, Rihanna and more celebrating "Costume Art" - CBS News
articles.description: Rihanna, Sabrina Carpenter, Madonna, and Beyoncé all wore their best looks to celebrate the "Costume Art" theme at the 2026 Met Gala. Here are some of the best moments, photos, and more from the night.

articles.title: Taraji P. Henson Slams Celebs Attending Bezos-Sponsored Met Gala: “WTF Are We Doing?” - Deadline
articles.description: Taraji P. Henson is censuring fellow A-Listers for attending this year's Met Gala, which is controversially sponsored by honorary co-chair Jeff Bezos.

articles.title: Blake Lively Chose Archival Versace—and a 13-Foot Train!—for Her 2026 Met Gala Return - Vogue
articles.description: The star, who has not attended the Met since 2022, chose a pastel Versace number from spring 2006 that was inspired by 18th century Venetian Rococo paintings.

articles.title: Madonna Enchants in a Sheer Cape—Carried by 7 Ladies-in-Waiting—at the 2026 Met Gala - Vogue
articles.description: The pop star’s showstopping Met Gala look was designed by Anthony Vaccarello for Saint Laurent (with Kiko Milano on her face), and inspired by the work of surrealist artist Leonora Carrington.

articles.title: Beyoncé Proclaims Cowboy Carter Is Over at the 2026 Met Gala - Vogue
articles.description: Beyonce's 2026 Met Gala gown features a rhinestone-embellished skeleton and intricate headpeice.

articles.title: Heidi Klum Shocks at 2026 Met Gala With Custom Made ‘Living Sculpture’ Ensemble - Variety
articles.description: Heidi Klum paid homage to work of arts at the 2026 MET Gala, wearing a custom-made outfit intended to transform Klum into a living sculpture.

articles.title: Connor Storrie Is ‘Really Not Nervous’ for His Met Gala Debut - GQ
articles.description: “In these rooms, I feel like I’m able to just be myself and flow and move and chat,” says the 'Heated Rivalry' star in an exclusive interview ahead of his first-ever Met with Saint Laurent. “I think it’s going to be a beautiful zoo.”

articles.title: Nicole Kidman's Daughter Sunday Rose, 17, Breaks Major Met Gala Rule With Debut in Gown Bursting With Florals - instyle.com
articles.description: Nicole Kidman's 17-year-old daughter Sunday Rose made her Met Gala debut on May 4, 2026. The teenager looked just like her mom in a pink gown bursting with florals. See her ensemble, here.

articles.title: Dolly Parton cancels Las Vegas residency over health issues - BBC
articles.description: The 80-year-old country music star said it will take some time for her to be "stage-performance ready" again.
